$backendKeyFromVariableGroup = "$(BackendKey)"

if (![string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($backendKeyFromVariableGroup) -and $backendKeyFromVariableGroup -ne '$(BackendKey)') {
    $value = $backendKeyFromVariableGroup
    Write-Host "Using BackendKey from variable group: '${value}'"
} else {
    Write-Host "BackendKey variable not provided. Searching $((Get-Location).Path)\main.tf for backend configuration"
    [string]$line = Select-String -Path "main.tf" -Pattern '^\s*key.*=.*$' -List

    if ($line) {
        $var = $line.Split('=', 2).Trim()
        $value = $var[1]
        $value = $value.Replace('"', '')
    }

    Write-Host "Using BackendKey from main.tf fallback: '${value}'"
}

Write-Host ("##vso[task.setvariable variable=BackendKey]${value}")
